items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior related to user data isolation in multi-tenant agents. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific data or outcomes that confirm whether this scenario is supported or results in a clear failure report. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not address the specific requirements of this scenario, leading to an inconclusive status.
